svg.title: KOSMOS v0.1-alpha — Chapter 4: Role and Responsibilities
svg.desc: Solo student project umyunsang — role matrix, tools, and Agent Teams delegation pattern. Source: AGENTS.md
svg.text: Architecture · Backend · TUI · Tests · Docs · Plugin DX · Release
Claude Code (Opus 4.7) · GitHub Spec Kit · GitHub Actions
Copilot Review Gate · Codex Review · Infisical OIDC
3+ 독립 Task → 병렬 dispatch · 1-2 Task → Lead 단독

g.text: uv run pytest before every commit
⏺ All source text in English · Korean domain data only exception
⏺ Env vars prefixed KOSMOS_* · Never commit .env or secrets/
⏺ Pydantic v2 for all tool I/O · Never Any · stdlib logging only
⏺ Never call live data.go.kr APIs from CI tests
⏺ Never add a dependency outside a spec-driven PR
⏺ Zero new runtime deps policy maintained through all 6 Phases
⏺ Never force-push main · Never --no-verify · Never bypass signing
⏺ Never commit a file larger than 1 MB without asking
⏺ Never introduce Go or Rust · TypeScript allowed only for TUI
⏺ Issue tracking via GraphQL only (Sub-Issues API v2)
⏺ PR body: Closes #EPIC only — never Task sub-issues

svg.text: Solo student portfolio · KSC 2026 · Apache-2.0 · Not affiliated with Anthropic / LG AI Research / Korean Government
